reviews.review_description: I gave the owner my honest opinion, and i tried to confront him about the stolen face but then he said that he made it then said that his friend gave it to him. He was really rude in the game and outside the game. When he joined the game im a moderator in (Probosciss) he lied about being a staff member for the game and told me to suck his d!ck and then he was really toxic to me and said the game is trash.
Dark showed me this now Im mod and it’s really fun the music is a banger
I'm admin and good music and staff really fun

Ok first I just got to say the starting music when you lode in is FIRE and the horror map is great so is pvp and zero gravity.This game was probably one of my favorite games on vr because there is a lot to do and some fun maps that you can do fun stuff like pvp and the beach place and so as the water slide.met the owner when I first played and some moderators too SHOUT OUT TO BANANAMAN/one of the moderators. That is probably all I have to say about this game it is super fun and I would definitely recommend for vr experiences
I got this game when I came out June 7th 2026 it’s really good there are a few bugs but the owner is epic you should join the discord too 😀 so yeah it’s pretty rad download it now
